meta.name: Ergo Luxe
meta.description: A high-end modern furniture and workspace store. The design features a clean, structured layout with bold typography, ample whitespace, and a striking red accent color to highlight promotions. It balances functional clarity with premium lifestyle imagery.

header.notes: Top utility bar with region selector, promo text, and secondary links. Main header has a search input on the left, centered navigation links, and account/cart icons on the right. 'Sale' link is highlighted in primary color.

footer.notes: Multi-column layout. Left column has newsletter signup and social icons. Middle columns are link lists (Customer Service, Product). Bottom section includes copyright, legal links, and payment icons.

productCard.notes: Cards have a subtle grey background for the image area. Titles are bold. Prices show original price crossed out in black and sale price in primary red. Badges for 'Sale' and 'Made to Order' in top corners. Color swatches below price.

productGrid.notes: Horizontal scrolling list or grid of product cards. A top border spans across the section above the grid.

featuredProducts.notes: Standard grid layout with visible badges and pricing.

sections.name: mega-menu

design.text: Dark foreground, bold category headers, standard link text
design.styling: No borders, generous padding, wide layout

content.specialElements: Rightmost column acts as a featured link/area.

sections.notes: Appears to be a state of the header when 'Discover' is hovered.

sections.name: hero-video

design.background: Dark solid color placeholder for video/image
design.styling: No borders, completely flush with edges

media.description: Large atmospheric video or image area (currently solid dark grey)

sections.notes: Acts as the main hero visual immediately below the header.

sections.name: category-links
sections.layout: Flexbox row, horizontally scrolling or evenly spaced text links

design.background: Solid light grey matching page background
design.text: Large, bold sans-serif text, dark foreground
design.styling: Underlines on active/hover state, separated by thick horizontal lines

sections.notes: Secondary navigation to filter content below.

sections.name: promo-banner
sections.layout: Full-width banner, text left, button right

design.text: White text, large bold headline, smaller subheadline
design.styling: Padding around content, white bordered button

content.headline: Promotional event title
content.cta: Single white outline button, square corners (0rem), white text

sections.notes: High contrast section to draw attention to a sale.

sections.name: feature-split
sections.layout: 2-column grid, ~60/40 split, image left, text right

design.background: Solid light grey matching page background
design.text: Dark foreground, prominent display heading, standard body
design.styling: Generous padding, image fills its container

content.headline: Category specific promotional headline
content.body: Paragraph explaining the category features and offer
content.cta: Single primary red button, square corners (0rem), white text

media.description: Lifestyle shot of an ergonomic gaming chair in a modern workspace setup.

sections.notes: Highlights a specific product category with contextual imagery.

sections.name: brand-story

design.styling: Images top with text below, large section headline above everything

content.headline: Aspirational statement about living and working

media.description: Two images side-by-side: one showing chairs in an office, another showing a storefront exterior.

content.specialElements: Headings act as links with thick black underlines.

sections.notes: Used to guide users to physical stores or buying guides.

sections.name: features-row

design.text: Dark foreground, bold headings, centered text
design.styling: Large thin outline icons above text

media.description: Delivery truck, return box, warranty badge icons

sections.notes: Builds trust with core service offerings.
